home.title: Master your skills
home.description: Academic Atelier offers a carefully curated collection of knowledge for modern learners. Learn from leading experts in technology, design, and business to build your skills and advance your career.
home.socialProof: More than 12,000 learners joined this month
home.certificateDescription: Earn official certificates from leading organizations and academies around the world.
home.exploreDescription: Programs are organized by discipline to help you study in depth and develop well-rounded skills.
home.technologyDescription: Master modern programming, artificial intelligence, and system design.
home.humanitiesDescription: Explore thought, ethics, and the core values of humanity.
home.newsletterDescription: Receive in-depth articles, new courses, and useful knowledge every week, carefully selected to support your learning journey.

courses.systemDataDescription: This list is loaded directly from course, category, instructor, lesson, enrollment, and review data in the database.

courses.summary: {{courses}} courses, {{categories}} categories, and {{lessons}} lessons are available to learners.

categories.title: Master your skills with real course data.
categories.description: Explore active course categories with instructor, lesson, tuition, and review information loaded directly from the database.

learning.openVideo: Open video in a new tab

learning.quizMissingDescription: This lesson has no quiz questions in the database. Submit the quiz to record temporary completion and continue.
learning.assignmentDescription: Assignments provide additional practice but do not lock the next lesson.
learning.noAssignmentDescription: The instructor has not created an assignment for this lesson.
learning.assignmentHint: The assignment is optional and does not block the next lesson
learning.requiredHint: Complete this item to unlock the next step
learning.quizUnavailableMessage: This lesson has no quiz data. Temporary completion has been recorded so you can continue.
learning.quizPassedMessage: You answered every question correctly. The quiz has been recorded successfully.
learning.quizFailedMessage: Some answers were incorrect. Please restart the quiz.

dashboard.noResultsDescription: Scores and pass statuses will appear here after you complete an exam.

sidebar.rule1: Join or sign in to the exam room at least 15 minutes early.
sidebar.rule2: Prepare your student account and a stable device before starting.
sidebar.rule3: Do not switch tabs or use materials unless the exam permits it.
sidebar.rule4: Check your network connection before submitting to avoid data loss.
sidebar.supportDescription: If you have trouble opening an exam, contact support immediately for assistance.

taking.notReady: This exam is not currently available.
taking.pendingEssay: Multiple-choice questions have been graded. Essay questions will appear as pending in the review.
taking.graded: The exam was submitted and automatically graded successfully.
taking.submitError: An error occurred while submitting the exam.
taking.draftError: Your answers remain in this browser. Check your connection before continuing.
